title: Music Discs & Covers
description: Easy customizable! Add your own songs and textures to music discs, or stick with the pack's new, default ones.
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a02fde4e9d75355e4a6e0b020ac94699de6f8038.png)

# Overview
This resource pack makes it very simple to customize music discs. It includes cover designs by default, but you can switch them out for your own images. You can also change the music tracks to whatever you want.

You'll find the guide in the pack folder.
